text:

- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

This is the exact title of the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count (4,665 events).

text:
Confirmed. I sent an email to **oncall@acme.io** with:
- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

This is the exact title of the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count (4,665 events).
